executives.name: Tony Sage
executives.background: Mr. Sage has over 35 years of experience in the fields of corporate advisory services, funds management, and capital markets. He is the Executive Chairman of European Lithium Ltd and has served as a director of several ASX-listed companies.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Executive Officer and Executive Chairman

executives.name: Paul Lloyd
executives.background: Mr. Lloyd is a Chartered Accountant with over 30 years of experience in corporate finance and management of publicly listed companies. He has served as a director and CFO for several mining and exploration companies.

board_of_directors.name: Tony Sage
board_of_directors.background: Executive Chairman of European Lithium Ltd with extensive experience in capital markets and corporate advisory.

board_of_directors.name: Dietrich Wanke
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Wanke has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. He has held senior management roles at various mining operations globally and is the CEO of European Lithium Ltd.

board_of_directors.name: Malcolm Day
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Day has over 25 years of experience in the management of publicly listed companies. He is currently the Managing Director of Delecta Limited.

board_of_directors.name: Mykhailo Zhernov
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Zhernov is the Managing Partner of Millstone & Co, an investment and financial group. He has extensive experience in investment banking and private equity.

board_of_directors.name: Bakhrom Saydivaliev
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Saydivaliev has over 20 years of experience in finance and investment. He has held various senior positions in financial institutions and investment firms.
